about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Our hotel serving in the captivating atmosphere of Mount Nemrut
about.heading: Where Nature and History Meet
about.description: Güneş Motel is located only 2 km from Mount Nemrut, making it one of the closest hotels to Mount Nemrut in the region. Positioned within the Malatya province at the easiest and fastest access point to Mount Nemrut, our motel offers comfortable accommodation to its guests with 10 rooms, 25 bed capacity, and a 30-person restaurant. Serving with over 30 years of experience, Güneş Motel is an ideal accommodation choice for Mount Nemrut sunrise and sunset visits, allowing guests to effortlessly and pleasantly experience the unique view of Nemrut.
about.detailedDescription:
Nemrut Güneş Motel is located in Büyüköz Village, Pütürge district of Malatya, only 2 km from UNESCO World Heritage Site Mount Nemrut, making it the closest accommodation facility in the region. Operated for over 30 years, our motel has become a trusted and well-established stopover that both domestic and international guests choose with confidence.

Thanks to our advantage of being the closest hotel to Mount Nemrut, we offer quick and easy access especially for Mount Nemrut sunrise and sunset tours. Our guests can experience this unique natural phenomenon without fatigue or time loss. Our location within Malatya province facilitates access to the region while also providing convenient reach to historical and cultural treasures such as Commagene Kingdom ruins on the Adıyaman side.

Our motel serves as an ideal base not only for those wishing to explore Mount Nemrut and Commagene historical sites but also for travelers seeking to visit tourist attractions in the Malatya and Adıyaman regions. Additionally, it offers a safe stopover where those traveling through Eastern and Southeastern Anatolia routes can rest and continue their journey peacefully.

With our 10 rooms, 25-bed capacity, and 30-person restaurant, we prepare a comfortable and welcoming environment for our guests. Our modern amenities include 24/7 hot water, free WiFi, central heating system, private parking, and spacious garden area. All our rooms feature mountain views and offer clean and spacious accommodation.
about.nearbyPlacesDesc: Historical places easily accessible from our hotel

nemrut.name: Mount Nemrut
nemrut.desc: Magnificent tumulus and giant statues on the UNESCO World Heritage List.

karakus.name: Karakuş Tumulus
karakus.desc: Historical burial monument from the Kingdom of Commagene.

cendere.name: Cendere Bridge
cendere.desc: Ancient bridge from Roman times still in use today.

arsemia.name: Arsemia Ancient Site
arsemia.desc: Ruins of the summer capital of the Kingdom of Commagene.

kahta.name: Kahta Castle
kahta.desc: Historical castle from the Mamluk period.

perre.name: Perre Ancient City
perre.desc: Ancient city famous for its rock tombs and historical ruins.

somuncuBaba.name: Somuncu Baba Complex (Darende)
somuncuBaba.desc: Complex dedicated to Somuncu Baba; with its mosque, tomb and peaceful surroundings, it is a spiritual visit point.

gunpinar.name: Günpınar (Gürpınar) Waterfall
gunpinar.desc: Ideal waterfall for photography and nature walks with its turquoise waters and natural structure.

tohma.name: Tohma Canyon
tohma.desc: Canyon that attracts nature lovers with its steep cliffs and hiking trails.

levent.name: Levent Valley
levent.desc: Natural area famous for its canyon views, hiking trails and sunset viewing terraces.

faq.title: Mount Nemrut Hotel FAQ | Frequently Asked Questions - Güneş Hotel
faq.metaDescription: Everything you need to know about our Mount Nemrut hotel. Reservations, sunrise tour, transportation, prices and more. 30+ Q&A.
faq.metaKeywords: mount nemrut faq, nemrut hotel questions, nemrut sunrise time, nemrut entrance fee, nemrut transportation, gunes hotel faq
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: What you need to know about Mount Nemrut and Güneş Hotel

accommodation.q: How far are you from Mount Nemrut?
accommodation.a: Güneş Hotel is only 2 km from the summit of Mount Nemrut. For the sunrise tour, you can reach the summit by car in about 10 minutes from our hotel. As the nearest hotel in the region, we provide great convenience to our guests.

accommodation.q: How can I make a hotel reservation?
accommodation.a: For online reservation, you can fill out the contact form on our website, call us at +90 543 876 7271, or contact us via WhatsApp. Special discount opportunities are available for early reservations.

accommodation.q: What are the check-in and check-out times?
accommodation.a: Our check-in time is 14:00 and check-out time is 12:00. Early check-in or late check-out can be arranged for an additional fee depending on availability. Please notify us in advance.
You can cancel free of charge up to 7 days before arrival. Cancellations made within 7 days will be charged for 1 night. Different cancellation terms may apply on special days (holidays, New Year's).

accommodation.q: How many hotel rooms do you have? What is your capacity?
accommodation.a: Our hotel has a total of 10 rooms. With our 25-bed capacity, we offer double, triple and family rooms (5 people). All our rooms have mountain views.

Our 2026 season prices: Standard/Double room €85/night, Triple room €115/night, Family room (5 people) €145/night. Breakfast and dinner are included in our prices. Prices may vary during summer season and holidays.

nemrut.q: What time should we leave for the sunrise tour?
nemrut.a: For sunrise tours, departure is between 04:00-04:30 in summer months (May-September) and 05:00-05:30 in winter months (October-April). Since sunrise times vary by season, you can call our reception for updated information. Only 10 minutes from Güneş Hotel to the summit!

nemrut.q: What is the entrance fee for Mount Nemrut?
nemrut.a: For 2026, the Mount Nemrut National Park entrance fee is 200 TL for adults and 100 TL for students. Museum card is valid. Children under 12 are free. Fees may vary seasonally.

nemrut.q: When is the best time to visit Mount Nemrut? Which season is best?
nemrut.a: You can visit Mount Nemrut year-round. The most popular period is between May-October. June-September is the warmest period (clear weather, clear views). In winter, the snowy landscape is uniquely beautiful but roads can be challenging. Spring (April-May) and autumn (September-October) are ideal periods.

nemrut.q: Are there sunset tours as well?
nemrut.a: Yes, we also organize sunset tours. Departure is usually 1.5-2 hours before sunset. Sunset tours are less crowded and offer great photo opportunities. Ideal plan: Evening sunset + next morning sunrise.

nemrut.q: What is the road to Nemrut like? Is it difficult?
nemrut.a: There is an asphalt road from our hotel to the Nemrut summit. From the parking area to the summit, you climb 400 meters of stone steps (15-20 minutes). It's a moderately difficult walk. Comfortable shoes, water and sunscreen in summer are a must.
Camping is officially prohibited within Mount Nemrut National Park. Hotel accommodation is recommended for safety and comfort. Güneş Hotel is the nearest hotel to the summit at 2 km.

facilities.q: Is there WiFi in the rooms?
facilities.a: Yes, free WiFi service is available in all our rooms and common areas. You can get the password from reception. Internet speed is usually good, but there may be occasional slowdowns as we are in a mountainous area.

facilities.q: Is breakfast included at the hotel?
facilities.a: Yes, breakfast is included in the price for all our rooms. You can start the day with traditional Turkish breakfast (olives, cheese, eggs, jam, honey, butter, vegetables). If you have special dietary needs, you can let us know in advance.

facilities.q: Is there a restaurant? Do you serve dinner?
facilities.a: Yes, we serve Turkish cuisine in our 30-person restaurant. Dinner service is available (half board option). You can try local flavors and home-cooked meals. It is recommended to notify us in advance.
Yes, the hotel has private and free parking. You can park your vehicle safely. It is not covered parking but is within a secure area.

facilities.q: Is there air conditioning in the rooms?
facilities.a: Our rooms have central heating system. In summer, air conditioning is usually not necessary as the regional climate is cool. Night temperature is around 15-20°C. The heating system operates actively in winter.
Yes, all our rooms have 24-hour uninterrupted hot water service. Comfort and cleanliness are our priority.
Yes, we accept small and medium-sized pets (dogs, cats). You must notify us in advance and your pet must be leashed.

transportation.a: Yes, we offer transfer service to our hotel from Malatya Airport (145 km - 2 hours) and Adıyaman Airport (85 km - 1.5 hours). Our transfer service is free and you need to indicate your request during reservation.

transportation.q: How to get to Mount Nemrut?
transportation.a: There are three main routes to Nemrut: 1) Via Malatya (Pütürge - Güneş Hotel) - RECOMMENDED, 2) Via Adıyaman (Kahta - 85 km), 3) Via Şanlıurfa. Our hotel is on the Malatya route, at the nearest point to the summit (2 km).

transportation.q: How to get to the hotel from Malatya?
transportation.a: From Malatya center, take the D300 highway towards Pütürge (approximately 120 km). After Pütürge, follow the Mount Nemrut signs to reach our hotel (25 km). Total duration is approximately 2-2.5 hours.

transportation.q: Can you come by public transport?
transportation.a: There are buses from Malatya to Pütürge. However, there is no direct public transport from Pütürge to our hotel. You can use our transfer service or rent a taxi.

general.a: Yes, we accept small and medium-sized pets. However, prior notification is required. An additional fee applies for your pet (100 TL per night).

general.q: Is there a discount for children?
general.a: Children under 6 (in the same room with parents, without extra bed) are free. 50% discount applies for children aged 6-12. Adult pricing applies for children over 12.

general.q: Are there other places to visit nearby?
general.a: Yes! In addition to Nemrut, there are historical sites in the area such as Karakuş Tumulus (15 km), Cendere Bridge (20 km), Arsemia Ancient Site (25 km), Kahta Castle (30 km), Perre Ancient City (50 km). We can provide information about tour packages.
Yes, we accept all credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, Troy). Cash payment is also possible.

general.q: How many stars is the hotel?
general.a: Our hotel serves as a boutique family hotel at a 4-star comfort level. We prioritize guest satisfaction over official star classification.

1 night is enough just to see the Nemrut sunrise. However, if you want to visit other historical sites in the area, we recommend staying 2-3 nights. This way you can watch both sunrise and sunset, and visit Commagene ruins.
